title: "I almost lost my eye": Pokimane opens up about painful medical scare
summary_full: Twitch streamer Pokimane experienced a sudden and severe eye issue just before her birthday trip to Paris. An eyelash lodged in her tear duct caused intense pain and redness, nearly making her miss her flight. The rare condition surprised her doctor, but the eyelash was successfully removed, allowing her to travel.
